option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
spring.application.name=url_shortner
port=8080
#Datasource spring.datasource.url=jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/arunjugran spring.datasource.username=arunjugran spring.datasource.password= spring.jpa.show-sql=true spring.datasource.driver-class-name=org.postgresql.Driver spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=update
# Swagger UI & OpenAPI Configuration springdoc.swagger-ui.enabled=true springdoc.api-docs.path=/v3/api-docs springdoc.swagger-ui.path=/swagger-ui.html springdoc.swagger-ui.operations-sorter=method
